body:
this PR is another step for closing the distributed zstar conservation issue 

Edit: a couple of bugs including the `MutableVerticalDiscretization` and `SplitExplicitFreeSurface` were found
- The `surface_buffer_kernel_parameters` needs to include corners to make sure the column height is correctly computed when iterating the split explicit free surface
- In case of a non-distributed grid, we need to have topology-aware column_height operators that do not go and look in the halos when iterating the split explicit solution (this is `SplitExplicitFreeSurface` specific)
- topology-aware operators need to include the new topologies `RightCenterFolded` and `RightFaceFolded` which act the same as a `RightConnected` topology.

Closes #5161

labels.description: So things don't blow up and boil the lobsters alive

title: Introduce distributed conservation tests and fix some bugs
